# CAP

The Causal Agent Protocol (CAP) is an open protocol for discovering, invoking, and interpreting causal reasoning services.

## Overview

- [Overview](https://causalagentprotocol.io/docs/overview): Plain-language introduction to CAP and its protocol boundary.
- [Getting Started](https://causalagentprotocol.io/docs/getting-started): Recommended entry point for implementers and readers new to CAP.
- [Specification](https://causalagentprotocol.io/spec): Normative CAP specification landing page.

## Documentation

- [What Is Causality?](https://causalagentprotocol.io/docs/concepts/what-is-causality): Background on causality concepts used by CAP.
- [Quickstart for Clients](https://causalagentprotocol.io/docs/quickstart-client): How CAP clients discover and call CAP servers.
- [Quickstart for Servers](https://causalagentprotocol.io/docs/quickstart-server): How to expose a CAP server over HTTP.
- [Write an Honest Capability Card](https://causalagentprotocol.io/docs/guides/write-an-honest-capability-card): Guidance for truthful capability disclosure.
- [Expose CAP Over HTTP](https://causalagentprotocol.io/docs/guides/expose-cap-over-http): HTTP binding guidance and request flow.
- [Migrate From a Proprietary Causal API](https://causalagentprotocol.io/docs/guides/migrate-from-proprietary-causal-api): Migration guidance for existing causal APIs.
- [Extensions](https://causalagentprotocol.io/docs/guides/extensions): How to think about CAP extensions.
- [Why CAP](https://causalagentprotocol.io/docs/rationale/why-cap): Protocol rationale and positioning.

## Specification

- [Protocol](https://causalagentprotocol.io/spec/protocol): CAP scope, roles, state model, and binding model.
- [Capability Card](https://causalagentprotocol.io/spec/capability-card): Normative disclosure requirements for `/.well-known/cap.json`.
- [Causal Semantics](https://causalagentprotocol.io/spec/causal-semantics): `reasoning_mode`, `identification_status`, and `assumptions`.
- [Verbs](https://causalagentprotocol.io/spec/verbs): CAP verb surface and semantic expectations.
- [Message Format](https://causalagentprotocol.io/spec/message-format): Request and response envelope structure.
- [Conformance](https://causalagentprotocol.io/spec/conformance): Level model and current `v0.2.x` conformance rules.
- [Extensions](https://causalagentprotocol.io/spec/extensions): Extension boundaries and compatibility expectations.
- [Specification Changelog](https://causalagentprotocol.io/spec/changelog): Changelog for spec-level changes.
